_meta.notes: Hand-curated from Tom's working recipe DB. Each menu picks 4-5 dishes that hang together as a course progression. Items not in the DB are not used. When the DB grows, re-curate.
_meta.policy: Sample menus are starting points. Every event gets a custom menu built around the host's tastes, dietary needs, and budget.

sampleMenus.title: Elegant Dinner Party
sampleMenus.subtitle: A four-course progression for intimate, refined evenings
sampleMenus.intro: Designed for dinner parties of 8 to 24 guests in your home or a private venue. We bring everything: ingredients, equipment, and on-site cooking and plating. The menu below is a starting point. We tailor every course around your tastes, dietary needs, and the occasion.

items: Spanish-style beef tapas kebabs with smoked paprika
Lebanese stuffed grape leaves with herbs and olive oil
Salmorejo: chilled Andalusian tomato soup, served in tasting glasses
Risotto alla Milanese with saffron and aged Parmigiano
or Lemon and chive risotto for a brighter, springtime variation
Chef John's quick cassoulet: French white beans, sausage, and confit
or The Zahav lamb shoulder for a slow-roasted Middle Eastern centerpiece
or Tarragon chicken cutlets for a lighter French-style entrée
sides: Roasted Brussels sprouts with butternut squash, maple, and walnuts

items: Cherry almond linzer cookies
Classic lemon meringue pie
or Moroccan lemon cake for a Mediterranean finish

sampleMenus.notes: Wine pairing notes available on request. Service style: plated multi-course, family-style, or buffet — your call.

sampleMenus.title: Mediterranean Grill
sampleMenus.subtitle: Bright, herb-driven cooking pulled from across the Mediterranean basin
sampleMenus.intro: Best for warm-weather gatherings of 15 to 60 guests. The cooking happens largely on grill and plancha with vibrant fresh sides. Adaptable for outdoor or indoor service.

items: Salmorejo: chilled tomato soup with sherry vinegar and good olive oil
Taktouka: Moroccan roasted pepper and tomato salad
Lebanese stuffed grape leaves
Joojeh kabob: Persian saffron-yogurt chicken on skewers
Spanish tapas-style beef kebabs
Balsamic-glazed salmon
or Pastilla: Moroccan skillet chicken pie for a richer option
Lemon-Caper sole as a lighter fish course
Rustic Italian crusty bread, warm
Honey-lime vinaigrette over a simple market green
Moroccan lemon cake
Turkish coffee brownies

sampleMenus.notes: Strong vegetarian capacity: most apps and sides scale up easily without protein. Vegan adaptations available.

sampleMenus.title: Big Game Souper Party
sampleMenus.subtitle: Cold-weather comfort for casual, crowd-pleasing gatherings
sampleMenus.intro: Built for game-day, milestone birthdays, and any event where the goal is comfort food done right. Serves 20 to 80, mostly buffet-style or self-serve stations. Focus on slow-cooked proteins, hearty sides, and food that holds up over a long event.

items: Creamy chicken noodle soup, served in mugs
Asturian fabada: Spanish white-bean and sausage stew
Stifado: long-braised Greek beef stew with cinnamon and red wine
Emeril's Texas-style smoked brisket, sliced to order
Slow-cooker Texas pulled pork on potato rolls
Tuscan-style spareribs with balsamic glaze
Swedish meatballs with cream sauce
Soft dinner rolls and Rustic Italian crusty bread
Roasted Brussels sprouts with butternut squash
Potatoes au gratin
Biscuit vegetable pot pie casserole
Sweet potato cheesecake
Strawberry shortcake cake
Chocolate raspberry cake

sampleMenus.notes: Designed to hold heat well across a 3-4 hour event. Chafing-dish service available. Perfect for game days, casual milestone birthdays, and corporate watch parties.

appetizers: Remoulade sauce à la New Orleans
breakfast: Banana bread (4 versions in DB — possible signature item)
_unusedRealItems._note: Items in the DB but not curated into the three sample menus. Available for custom menus or future menu expansion.
